subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. In all wherein thou dost sigh and lament, and art troubled and distressed, the truth is with thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ات رسید آنچه آه و فغان نماای و مضطرب و پریشان باشی حق با
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @consolation and comfort, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
